title: Prohibition of the manufacture, sale or distribution of the serodignostic kit for diagnosis of tuberculosis
description: Prohibition of the manufacture, sale or distribution of the serodignostic kit for diagnosis of tuberculosis

TTUST, WgR yf^ MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health and Family Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th June, 2012 GS.R. 432(E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that the use of the serodiagnostic test kits for diagnosis of tuberculosis are giving inconsistent and imprecise results leading to wrong diagnosis and their use is likely to involve risk to human beings and whereas safer alternatives are available; And whereas the Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale, distribution and use of the said test kits in public interest; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 26Aofthe Drugs and Cosmetic Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby prohibit the manufacture for sale, distribution and use of the following test kits with immediate effect. "Serodiagnostic test kits for diagnosis of tuberculosis" [F.No.X 11014/13/2011-DFQC (1)] ARUN K. PANDA, Jt. Secy. 2052 GI/2012 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-1 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
